name: 呼吸急促
descriptionEn: Wheezing

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 建议安乐死处理。

name: 腹泻
description: 从肠道异常频繁地排出半固体或液体粪便
descriptionEn: Abnormally frequent passage of semi-solid or liquid feces from the intestine

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 补液纠正脱水配合抗生素或驱虫治疗，若伴发血便、消瘦或脱水衰竭建议安乐死。

name: 被毛油腻
descriptionEn: Coat appears or feels greasy

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 建议加强笼具与垫料更换频率，保持环境干燥通风，同时排查饲料油脂含量与小鼠皮肤健康。

name: 水肿
description: 浆液在组织间隙或体腔内过度积聚
descriptionEn: Excessive accumulation of serous fluid in tissue interspaces or body cavities

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 建议先限制饮水、轻度利尿、局部轻柔热敷，同时排查过敏、感染或手术创伤，严重时及时剖检确认病因。

name: 分泌物
description: 泌尿生殖区域或周围存在大量黏液
descriptionEn: Presence of large amounts of mucus in or around the urogenital area

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 立即单笼隔离，保持泌尿生殖区域清洁干燥，避免小鼠舔舐抓挠；观察分泌物性状、颜色及伴随症状，排查泌尿或生殖系统感染、发情等原因，并监测饮水、排尿与精神状态。

name: 包茎
description: 包皮口缩窄，导致阴茎无法缩回
descriptionEn: Narrowing of the preputial orifice preventing retraction of the penis

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 轻柔清理包皮口分泌物与污垢，避免强行剥离造成损伤；局部清洁消毒、抗炎处理，严重粘连或排尿困难时实施包皮分离或对症手术治疗。

name: 皮下肿胀
description: 睾丸上出现各种描述（硬、软、形状各异等）的异常肿块
descriptionEn: Abnormal lumps of various descriptions (hard, soft, various shapes, etc.) on the testes

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 建议使用碘伏和生理盐水进行局部清创，配合Neosporin抗生素软膏治疗，严重者考虑安乐死以符合动物福利伦理。

config.suggestionMeasure: 黄疸：可能是肝胆疾病或败血症导致，若伴发严重肝衰竭或全身症状建议安乐死。紫绀：提示严重缺氧，建议安乐死。荧光绿：提示荧光蛋白标记表达或荧光染料污染

name: 皮下肿胀

name: 胎儿卡阻

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 必要时可进行剖腹产，若卡阻严重、母鼠体力衰竭或胎儿无法顺利娩出，及时按实验动物伦理安乐死处理。

name: 伤口
descriptionEn: Wounds on the paw

subOptions.descriptionEn: Skin injury with loss of epidermis and partial dermis, but not through the full skin thickness.

subOptions.description: 组织从其附着处撕裂造成的伤口。
subOptions.descriptionEn: Wound caused by tissue being torn from its point of attachment.

subOptions.description: 由尖锐物体造成的伤口。边缘平整，对周围组织损伤最小。
subOptions.descriptionEn: Wound caused by a sharp object. Edges are smooth with minimal damage to surrounding tissue.

subOptions.description: 组织撕裂造成的不规则伤口。
subOptions.descriptionEn: Irregular wound caused by tearing of tissue.

subOptions.description: 由尖刺物体（如咬伤）造成的穿透性伤口。
subOptions.descriptionEn: Penetrating wound caused by a pointed object (such as a bite).

subOptions.description: 皮肤和/或皮下结构损伤，但皮肤未破裂（例如：瘀伤、挤压伤）。
subOptions.descriptionEn: Damage to skin and/or subcutaneous structures without skin rupture (e.g., bruises, crush injuries).

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 建议先局部清创消毒，配合Neosporin抗生素软膏治疗，同时隔离饲养并排查垫料、笼具摩擦或感染因素，必要时做病原检测。

name: 尾部畸形
descriptionEn: Abnormal tail morphology

subOptions.description: 尾巴存在弯曲或扭结
subOptions.descriptionEn: Bends or kinks present in the tail

subOptions.description: 多处弯曲或扭结导致尾巴卷曲
subOptions.descriptionEn: Multiple bends or kinks causing the tail to curl

subOptions.description: 尾巴缺失
subOptions.descriptionEn: Tail is absent

subOptions.description: 长度比对照短
subOptions.descriptionEn: Length shorter than control

subOptions.description: 长度比对照长
subOptions.descriptionEn: Length longer than control

referenceImages.desc: 环境湿度异常导致环尾症

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 建议调整温湿度。如果受伤严重且不可逆，要考虑及逆行安乐死处理。

name: 缺失
descriptionEn: Missing ears

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 咬伤导致耳廓缺失，可进行局部清创消毒防感染，标识功能受损者需补充个体标记（如脚趾编号），反复咬伤或遗传缺陷者建议淘汰。

name: 被毛油腻
descriptionEn: Coat appears or feels greasy

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 建议加强笼具与垫料更换频率，保持环境干燥通风，同时排查饲料油脂含量与小鼠皮肤健康。

name: 弓背
description: 处于弯曲、俯卧或蜷缩的姿势
descriptionEn: Assumes a hunched, prone, or curled-up posture

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 多为疼痛、应激或患病表现，应立即隔离保温、补充营养凝胶，尽快排查感染、外伤或内脏问题并对症处理。

name: 活动减少
descriptionEn: Decreased activity

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 针对性镇痛补液或抗感染治疗，若伴发严重消瘦、瘫痪或意识障碍建议安乐死。

name: 攻击性增强
description: 与对照相比，受试者对其它小鼠表现出高于正常水平的支配性、攻击性姿态和/或敌对性身体动作
descriptionEn: Compared to controls, subject exhibits higher than normal levels of dominant, aggressive postures and/or hostile physical actions toward other mice

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 立即分笼单养并处理伤口，优化饲养密度，添加环境丰容物（遮蔽所、啃咬玩具）分散攻击性，反复打斗者建议淘汰。

name: 缺失
descriptionEn: Nipples absent

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 无法正常哺乳时，及时安排代乳；加强幼崽保暖，防止受冻、饥饿死亡；该类小鼠不建议留作种鼠，避免遗传后代。

name: 阴道脱垂
description: 阴道黏膜通过阴唇突出
descriptionEn: Protrusion of vaginal mucosa through the labia

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 建议局部清洁消毒后使用棉签蘸取生理盐水将阴道复位，若复位失败或组织坏死者需安乐死。

name: 无眼畸形
description: 出生时一只或两只眼睛缺失
descriptionEn: One or both eyes missing at birth

referenceImages.desc: 没有眼睛或眼睛无法张开

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 建议安乐死处理。

name: 头倾斜
descriptionEn: Head tilted to one side

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 建议优先隔离观察、排查前庭感染/中耳炎，按实验动物规范对症抗菌抗炎，无效及时淘汰。

name: 全窝死亡
descriptionEn: All pups found dead

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 避免出现连胎，分娩前增加高蛋白饲料，避免应激。

name: 分泌物
description: 鼻子内或周围有分泌物
descriptionEn: Discharge from or around the nose

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 加强保温通风，避免刺激气味与粉尘；轻柔清洁鼻腔周围，排查支原体、细菌感染或过敏诱因，对症抗感染、加强护理。

name: 早产
description: 已知交配和阴道栓日期后，过早产出活仔
descriptionEn: Premature delivery of live offspring, given known mating and vaginal plug date

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 置于安静保温环境，减少应激；保证母鼠充足营养与饮水，做好保暖防压踩；对活力差的幼鼠加强监护，若母鼠弃养或幼鼠无法存活，按实验动物伦理安乐死处理。

name: 呼吸缓慢

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 建议安乐死处理。

name: 全身性脱毛
description: 在生命周期中某段时间或全程无毛发
descriptionEn: Absence of hair at some period during life or throughout life

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 建议先单笼饲养，排查寄生虫、皮肤真菌、过敏或营养缺乏，保持笼具清洁干燥，修剪小鼠后脚指甲，多数小鼠几周内会重新长出毛发。

name: 肥胖
description: 极度肥胖，体重严重超标

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 可通过控制高脂饲料摄入、增加笼内活动量，配合定期称量体重、监测血糖血脂，改善SPF小鼠肥胖状态。

name: 部分幼仔死亡
descriptionEn: Some pups found dead

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 避免出现连胎，分娩前增加高蛋白饲料，避免应激。

name: 不动且对触摸无反应
descriptionEn: Immobile and unresponsive to touch

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 提示濒死或深度昏迷，需立即评估生命体征（呼吸、心跳），确认无自主呼吸或角膜反射消失后实施安乐死，并送检尸体明确病因。

name: 无反应性
description: 对笼内同伴的反应减弱

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 排查疼痛、感染、低血糖或濒死状态，及时隔离并给予保温等急救处理。

name: 黏液性分泌物

3.descriptionEn: Default score of 3 if not checked

config.suggestionMeasure: 建议先单笼饲养，排查寄生虫、皮肤真菌、过敏或营养缺乏，保持笼具清洁干燥，修剪小鼠后脚指甲，多数小鼠几周内会重新长出毛发。

1.description: 外观：运输工具外观残破，锈迹、污渍严重，多处破损变形。内部清洁：内部污垢、粪便等堆积，恶臭难闻，污垢覆盖厚。消毒情况：长期未消毒，细菌、病毒滋生，霉斑、菌落明显。通风与异味：通风系统损坏，空气不流通，异味刺鼻。
1.descriptionEn: Appearance: Broken, severely rusted and stained transport vehicle with multiple damaged and deformed areas. Interior cleanliness: Accumulated dirt, feces, and strong odor with thick contamination. Disinfection: Long-term without disinfection, bacteria and viruses proliferating, visible mold and colonies. Ventilation: Ventilation system broken, no air circulation, pungent odor.

2.level: 卫生状况一般，部分指标接近良好
2.description: 外观：运输工具外观有磨损、污渍，轻微划痕、掉漆，结构稳固，基本整洁。内部清洁：内部少量污垢、杂物，异味轻，污垢在角落缝隙。消毒情况：消毒较规范，残留适量，大部分细菌被杀灭。通风情况：通风系统基本正常，空气缓慢流通，异味渐散。
2.descriptionEn: Appearance: Transport vehicle with wear, stains, minor scratches and paint loss, but structurally sound and basically clean. Interior cleanliness: Minor dirt and debris, light odor, contamination in corners and crevices. Disinfection: Relatively standard, adequate residual, most bacteria eliminated. Ventilation: System basically functional, slow air circulation, odor gradually dissipating.

3.description: 外观：运输工具外观整洁，无明显破损污渍。内部清洁：内部干净，灰尘少异味轻。消毒情况：严格按规定消毒，残留适量安全。通风情况：通风系统高效，空气流通快，异味速排。
3.descriptionEn: Appearance: Clean transport vehicle without obvious damage or stains. Interior cleanliness: Clean interior with minimal dust and light odor. Disinfection: Strict disinfection per regulations with safe residual levels. Ventilation: Efficient ventilation system with rapid air circulation and quick odor elimination.

name: 禁食禁水时间和方法确定合理性
nameEn: Rationality of Fasting Time and Method

1.description: 时间确定：时间设定无科学依据，长短失当，会损害动物健康或干扰实验结果。方法确定：方法简单粗放，未考虑个体差异，易致动物应激反应大。
1.descriptionEn: Time determination: No scientific basis for time settings; inappropriate duration that may harm animal health or interfere with experimental results. Method determination: Crude and simple methods not considering individual differences, causing significant stress in animals.

2.level: 基本合格，但有改进空间
2.levelEn: Basically Qualified with Room for Improvement
2.description: 时间确定：能按一般需求定时间，但未顾及特殊实验要求，时间有偏差。方法确定：有方法但不够灵活，对特殊动物无针对性调整，影响效果。
2.descriptionEn: Time determination: Time set based on general needs but not considering special experimental requirements, with deviations. Method determination: Some methods but not flexible enough; no targeted adjustments for special animals, affecting outcomes.

3.description: 时间确定：综合多因素科学定时间，兼顾实验与动物健康需求。方法确定：方法合理多样，考虑个体差异，降低动物应激。
3.descriptionEn: Time determination: Scientific time setting integrating multiple factors, balancing experimental and animal health needs. Method determination: Reasonable and diverse methods considering individual differences, reducing animal stress.

1.description: 没有根据动物的种类、数量，和实验操作的种类来配合足量合适的人员。
1.descriptionEn: Staffing not based on animal species, quantity, and types of experimental operations to allocate sufficient and appropriate personnel.

2.description: 根据动物的种类、数量，和实验操作的种类来配备人员，但人员数量和资质有待提升。
2.descriptionEn: Personnel allocated based on animal species, quantity, and experimental operations, but staff numbers and qualifications need improvement.

3.description: 人员数量、资质配备合理。
3.descriptionEn: Staff numbers and qualifications are appropriately allocated.

name: 动物福利管理规定制定合理性
nameEn: Rationality of Animal Welfare Management Regulations

1.description: 规定内容：严重缺失，仅涉及极少数福利方面，对关键内容如疼痛控制、心理福利等未作规定。条款实用性：脱离实际，未考虑实验差异，规定难执行，或阻碍正常实验。更新与完善：无更新机制，长期不修订，与行业新理念、法规脱节。
1.descriptionEn: Regulation content: Severely deficient, covering only very few welfare aspects, with no provisions for key content such as pain control and psychological welfare. Provision practicality: Disconnected from reality, not considering experimental differences; regulations difficult to implement or hindering normal experiments. Updates: No update mechanism; long-term without revision, inconsistent with new industry concepts.

2.level: 基本合理，但有改进空间
2.levelEn: Basically Reasonable with Room for Improvement
2.description: 规定内容：有一定基础，涵盖主要方面但不够细致，如日常照料规定笼统。条款实用性：基本可行，特殊场景下适用性差，存在模糊地带易引发争议。更新与完善：有更新计划但执行慢，频率低，难反映行业变化。
2.descriptionEn: Regulation content: Some foundation, covering main aspects but not detailed enough, with general daily care provisions. Provision practicality: Basically feasible but poor applicability in special scenarios, with ambiguous areas causing disputes. Updates: Update plans exist but execution slow, low frequency, difficult to reflect industry changes.

3.description: 规定内容：全面细致，涵盖福利各方面，还针对不同动物和实验类型专项规定。条款实用性：紧密结合实际，考虑操作细节，可操作性和指导性强。更新与完善：定期更新，依行业动态、成果和反馈修订，符合实际需求。
3.descriptionEn: Regulation content: Comprehensive and detailed, covering all welfare aspects, with specific provisions for different animal types and experimental types. Provision practicality: Closely integrated with reality, considering operational details, with strong operability and guidance. Updates: Regular updates based on industry developments, research findings, and feedback, meeting practical needs.

1.description: 运输工具设备缺失严重，关键部件如温控、通风装置等损坏无法运行，严重影响动物运输安全与健康。
1.descriptionEn: Severe equipment deficiency in transport vehicle; critical components such as temperature control and ventilation devices damaged and inoperable, seriously affecting animal transport safety and health.

2.description: 运输工具部分设备不齐全，存在个别设备故障但不影响基本运输功能，整体运行稳定性欠佳。
2.descriptionEn: Some equipment incomplete in transport vehicle; individual equipment malfunctions not affecting basic transport function; overall operational stability suboptimal.

3.description: 运输工具设备配备齐全，温控、通风、监测等所有设备均运行正常，能充分保障动物运输安全与舒适。
3.descriptionEn: Transport vehicle fully equipped; all equipment including temperature control, ventilation, and monitoring systems operating normally, fully ensuring animal transport safety and comfort.

name: 禁食禁水期间观察记录准确性
nameEn: Accuracy of Observation Records During Fasting

1.description: 观察内容：观察项目严重缺失，仅盯个别指标，忽略行为生理等重要变化，难掌握动物全貌。记录准确性：记录随意，错误频发，数据与实际不符，严重影响后续判断。
1.descriptionEn: Observation content: Severely deficient observation items, focusing on only individual indicators while ignoring important behavioral and physiological changes; difficult to grasp overall animal condition. Recording accuracy: Arbitrary recording with frequent errors; data inconsistent with actual conditions, seriously affecting subsequent judgment.

2.level: 基本合格，但有改进空间
2.levelEn: Basically Qualified with Room for Improvement
2.description: 观察内容：项目基本覆盖主要方面，但不够细致，遗漏细节，可能漏掉关键信息。记录准确性：记录基本完整，有少量错误或模糊表述，需进一步核实确认。
2.descriptionEn: Observation content: Items basically covering main aspects but not detailed enough, missing nuances and potentially omitting critical information. Recording accuracy: Generally complete records but with minor errors or ambiguous expressions requiring further verification.

3.description: 观察内容：项目全面细致，涵盖多维度，能精准反映动物状态。记录准确性：记录准确规范，与实际高度一致，方便查阅分析，为实验提供可靠依据。
3.descriptionEn: Observation content: Comprehensive and detailed items covering multiple dimensions, capable of precisely reflecting animal condition. Recording accuracy: Accurate and standardized records highly consistent with actual conditions, convenient for review and analysis, providing reliable basis for experiments.

name: 人员培训考核和评估严格性
nameEn: Strictness of Personnel Training and Assessment

1.description: 培训内容：内容零散无体系，核心知识缺失且更新慢，难契合工作需求。考核方式：形式单一，多为简单问答，实操占比低，难测真实能力。评估机制：无正式评估，培训后不追踪，对不达标者无处理，培训无效。
1.descriptionEn: Training content: Fragmented without systematic framework; core knowledge missing with slow updates; poorly matching job requirements. Assessment methods: Single format, mostly simple Q&A with low practical component; unable to test actual abilities. Evaluation mechanism: No formal evaluation; no post-training tracking; no consequences for substandard performance; training ineffective.

2.level: 有一定严格性，但需改进
2.description: 培训内容：有基础框架，但关键知识点讲解不深入，部分操作技巧等缺失。考核方式：方式常规，有理论和实操，但标准模糊，对操作细节评分不明。评估机制：有简单评估，周期长、指标少，未全面考量人员场景表现。
2.descriptionEn: Training content: Basic framework exists but key knowledge points insufficiently in-depth; lacking some operational skills. Assessment methods: Standard methods with theory and practice but with vague standards; unclear scoring of operational details. Evaluation mechanism: Simple evaluation exists but with long cycles and few indicators; not comprehensively assessing scenario performance.

3.description: 培训内容：全面系统且紧跟前沿，涵盖多方面知识，依岗位定制内容。考核方式：科学严谨，多种形式结合，标准明确严格且可量化。评估机制：长效多维评估，定期追踪，从多角度评估并依结果奖惩。
3.descriptionEn: Training content: Comprehensive, systematic, and keeping up with the latest developments, covering multiple knowledge areas with customized content per position. Assessment methods: Scientifically rigorous with multiple combined formats; clear, strict, and quantifiable standards. Evaluation mechanism: Long-term multi-dimensional evaluation with regular tracking; multi-perspective assessment with rewards and consequences based on results.

name: 管理规定执行情况监督严格性

1.description: 监督频率：监督频次低，数月才查一次，难及时揪出违规。违规处理：违规处理宽松，多为口头警告，无实质惩罚，违规难禁。
1.descriptionEn: Supervision frequency: Low frequency, checked only every few months; difficult to timely identify violations. Violation handling: Lenient violation handling, mostly verbal warnings without substantive penalties; violations difficult to stop.

2.level: 监督有一定严格性，但存在漏洞
2.description: 监督频率：有定期监督，但间隔长，难捕捉临时或隐蔽违规。违规处理：处理有力度，但标准不统一、执行不彻底。
2.descriptionEn: Supervision frequency: Regular supervision exists but with long intervals; difficult to catch temporary or covert violations. Violation handling: Handling has some force but with inconsistent standards and incomplete enforcement.

3.description: 监督频率：监督频次高，不定期与定期结合，随时可查违规。违规处理：违规零容忍，处理严格规范。
3.descriptionEn: Supervision frequency: High frequency combining scheduled and random inspections; violations can be caught at any time. Violation handling: Zero tolerance for violations; strict and standardized handling.

1.description: 运输工具存在防疫重大漏洞，如无有效隔离措施、有明显的活体病原体污染痕迹且未处理，极易造成动物疫情传播。
1.descriptionEn: Transport vehicle has major epidemic prevention gaps, such as no effective isolation measures, visible live pathogen contamination traces left untreated, extremely high risk of animal epidemic transmission.

2.description: 运输工具防疫措施有部分缺失，例如个别消毒环节不到位、部分区域防疫隔离不完善，有一定疫情传播风险。
2.descriptionEn: Partial gaps in epidemic prevention measures, such as inadequate disinfection at certain stages, incomplete isolation in some areas, presenting some risk of epidemic transmission.

3.description: 运输工具具备完善的防疫措施，严格消毒、有效隔离，能有效阻隔病原体，全方位保障实验动物防疫安全。
3.descriptionEn: Transport vehicle equipped with comprehensive epidemic prevention measures, strict disinfection, effective isolation, capable of blocking pathogens, fully ensuring laboratory animal epidemic prevention safety.

name: 禁食禁水期间异常情况调整及时性
nameEn: Timeliness of Adjustment for Abnormalities During Fasting

1.description: 反应速度：动物明显异常却长时间无反应，未及时调整，致健康恶化。调整效果：调整迟且效果差，无法改善状况，或造成不可逆损伤。
1.descriptionEn: Response speed: No response for extended periods despite obvious animal abnormalities; failure to make timely adjustments leading to health deterioration. Adjustment effectiveness: Delayed and ineffective adjustments, unable to improve conditions, or causing irreversible damage.

2.level: 基本合格，但有改进空间
2.levelEn: Basically Qualified with Room for Improvement
2.description: 反应速度：能察觉异常但反应慢，延迟调整，让动物多受不适。调整效果：措施基本合理，因延迟未能快速缓解异常，需持续调整。
2.descriptionEn: Response speed: Abnormalities detected but response slow; delayed adjustments causing animals additional discomfort. Adjustment effectiveness: Basically reasonable measures but unable to quickly alleviate abnormalities due to delays, requiring continued adjustment.

3.description: 反应速度：密切关注，发现异常立即反应，迅速制定执行调整方案。调整效果：措施精准有效，及时改善状况，保障动物福利与实验。
3.descriptionEn: Response speed: Close monitoring with immediate response upon detecting abnormalities; rapid development and execution of adjustment plans. Adjustment effectiveness: Precise and effective measures, timely improvement of conditions, ensuring animal welfare and experimental integrity.

name: 不合格人员处理及时性

1.description: 发现后响应：在明确知晓人员不合格情况后，长时间无任何处理动作，导致问题持续存在。
1.descriptionEn: Post-discovery response: After clearly identifying unqualified personnel, no action taken for extended periods, allowing problems to persist.

2.level: 处理有一定及时性，但存在拖延
2.description: 发现后响应：发现不合格人员后，能在较短时间内（如数天内）做出初步反应，表明会处理，但后续跟进不及时。
2.descriptionEn: Post-discovery response: Initial response within a relatively short time (e.g., within days) after discovering unqualified personnel, indicating intent to address the issue, but subsequent follow-up is not timely.

3.description: 发现后响应：一旦发现人员不合格，立即（当天或次日）做出响应，明确处理方向和初步措施，展现高效态度。
3.descriptionEn: Post-discovery response: Immediate response (same day or next day) upon discovering unqualified personnel, with clear handling direction and initial measures, demonstrating efficient attitude.

1.description: 运输人员完全无视操作流程，不检查动物就装载，粗暴对待致动物受伤或应激，违反防疫规定，增加交叉感染风险。
1.descriptionEn: Transport personnel completely disregard operational procedures; loading without animal inspection, rough handling causing animal injury or stress, violating epidemic prevention regulations, increasing cross-contamination risk.

2.description: 运输人员操作部分合规，环境监控与调整不及时，但防疫意识尚可，基本遵守防疫流程。
2.descriptionEn: Transport personnel partially compliant in operations; environmental monitoring and adjustments not timely, but adequate epidemic prevention awareness, basically following epidemic prevention procedures.

3.description: 运输人员严格按流程操作，装载前检查动物，轻柔有序；运输中关注环境并调整，严格遵守防疫规定，保障动物安全。
3.descriptionEn: Transport personnel strictly follow procedures; pre-loading animal inspection, gentle and orderly handling; monitoring and adjusting environment during transport, strict compliance with epidemic prevention regulations, ensuring animal safety.

1.description: 方案安全性：保定方法伤害风险大，严重威胁动物安全与福利。操作可行性：方案难执行，步骤与注意事项缺失，影响实验进度。
1.descriptionEn: Plan safety: Restraint methods with high injury risk, seriously threatening animal safety and welfare. Operational feasibility: Plan difficult to execute, missing steps and precautions, affecting experimental progress.

2.level: 基本合格，但有改进空间
2.levelEn: Basically Qualified with Room for Improvement
2.description: 方案安全性：基本保障安全但有潜在风险，未充分考量个体差异。操作可行性：有一定可操作性，步骤模糊，操作效率低。
2.descriptionEn: Plan safety: Basically ensures safety but with potential risks, not fully considering individual differences. Operational feasibility: Some operability but vague steps, low operational efficiency.

3.description: 方案安全性：兼顾动物福利与安全，方法温和，减少应激。操作可行性：方案详尽易操作，步骤清晰，涵盖多种情况。
3.descriptionEn: Plan safety: Balances animal welfare and safety with gentle methods, reducing stress. Operational feasibility: Detailed and easy-to-follow plan with clear steps, covering multiple scenarios.

name: 饮食饮水供应计划合理性
nameEn: Rationality of Food and Water Supply Plan

1.description: 饮食饮水供应计划缺失或极不合理，日常饲养与运输皆随意提供，未顾及动物个体差异，食物差、水易污染，无法满足生理需求，危害健康。
1.descriptionEn: Food and water supply plan missing or extremely unreasonable; daily care and transport with random provision ignoring individual animal differences; poor food quality, easily contaminated water, failing to meet physiological needs, endangering health.

2.description: 有计划但缺陷多，日常饲养与运输时未充分考虑动物个体及特殊阶段，食物水量供应不精准，补充时间频率不灵活，未随情况调整。
2.descriptionEn: Plan exists but with multiple flaws; daily care and transport not fully considering individual and special-stage animal needs; imprecise food and water supply; inflexible replenishment timing and frequency; not adjusted to conditions.

3.description: 制定科学详细计划，涵盖日常饲养与运输，综合多种因素精准确定饮食供应，合理安排补充时间和频率，依动物状态灵活调整。
3.descriptionEn: Scientific and detailed plan covering daily care and transport; comprehensive consideration of multiple factors for precise dietary supply; reasonable replenishment timing and frequency; flexible adjustment based on animal condition.

name: 保定操作人员培训到位程度

1.description: 知识掌握：理论极度匮乏，不知动物生理特性等基础内容，难应对基础问题。技能熟练度：操作生疏，基本操作错误多。
1.descriptionEn: Knowledge mastery: Extremely deficient theoretical knowledge; unaware of basic content such as animal physiological characteristics; unable to handle basic problems. Skill proficiency: Unskilled operations with frequent basic errors.

2.level: 基本合格，但有改进空间
2.levelEn: Basically Qualified with Room for Improvement
2.description: 知识掌握：掌握一定知识，特殊情况难有效处理。技能熟练度：能完成常规操作，但不够熟练规范，有小失误影响结果准确性。
2.descriptionEn: Knowledge mastery: Some knowledge mastery but difficulty handling special situations effectively. Skill proficiency: Can complete routine operations but not proficient or standardized enough, with minor errors affecting result accuracy.

3.description: 知识掌握：全面掌握各类知识。技能熟练度：操作娴熟规范。
3.descriptionEn: Knowledge mastery: Comprehensive mastery of all relevant knowledge. Skill proficiency: Skilled and standardized operations.

name: 饮食饮水供应及时性
nameEn: Timeliness of Food and Water Supply

1.description: 日常饲养与运输中，饮食饮水供应严重滞后，日常长时间断水断粮使动物健康受损。
1.descriptionEn: Severely delayed food and water supply during daily care and transport; prolonged periods without water and food in daily care, damaging animal health.

2.description: 饮食饮水供应基本有保障，但偶尔延迟。
2.descriptionEn: Food and water supply basically guaranteed but with occasional delays.

3.description: 日常饲养与运输均严格按时供应饮食饮水，日常精准满足需求，运输依时长和状态及时适量供应，保障动物良好状态。
3.descriptionEn: Strict on-time food and water supply during both daily care and transport; precise fulfillment of daily needs; timely and appropriate supply during transport based on duration and animal condition, ensuring animals remain in good condition.

name: 保定过程观察密切程度

1.description: 观察频次：观察间隔久，极少关注，难及时察觉动物异常。异常捕捉：对细微异常毫无察觉，严重问题出现才后知后觉。
1.descriptionEn: Observation frequency: Long intervals between observations, very infrequent monitoring; difficult to timely detect animal abnormalities. Abnormality detection: Completely unaware of subtle abnormalities; only noticing severe problems after the fact.

2.level: 基本合格，但有改进空间
2.levelEn: Basically Qualified with Room for Improvement
2.description: 观察频次：有间隔查看，但偶有遗漏，无法完全掌握情况。异常捕捉：能发现明显异常，不太明显表现捕捉不够及时。
2.descriptionEn: Observation frequency: Periodic checks but with occasional gaps; unable to fully track conditions. Abnormality detection: Can detect obvious abnormalities but not timely enough in catching less apparent signs.

3.description: 观察频次：全程高频观察，不放过任何细微变化。异常捕捉：能迅速精准捕捉异常，及时采取措施。
3.descriptionEn: Observation frequency: High-frequency monitoring throughout the entire process, not missing any subtle changes. Abnormality detection: Rapid and precise detection of abnormalities with immediate measures taken.

name: 手术人员培训和考核程度
nameEn: Degree of Surgical Personnel Training and Assessment

1.description: 培训情况：培训内容严重残缺，仅浅显涉及基础手术知识，时长不足，未触及关键要点。考核情况：考核形同虚设，形式简单随意，无法检验真实能力，人员技能良莠不齐。
1.descriptionEn: Training: Severely incomplete content, only superficially covering basic surgical knowledge, insufficient duration, not addressing key points. Assessment: Essentially perfunctory, simple and arbitrary format, unable to verify actual skills, resulting in uneven personnel competency.

2.level: 基本合格，但有改进空间
2.levelEn: Basically Qualified with Room for Improvement
2.description: 培训情况：有基础培训，但深度欠缺，新技术少，方式单一，培训效果有限。考核情况：考核标准宽松，部分人员能应付通过，难以保证扎实手术能力。
2.descriptionEn: Training: Basic framework exists but key knowledge points insufficiently covered, lacking new techniques, limited training methods and effectiveness. Assessment: Lenient standards; some personnel can pass superficially, difficult to ensure solid surgical skills.

3.description: 培训情况：培训全面系统，涵盖手术多方面内容，方式多样，理论与实践结合。考核情况：考核严格规范，多维度考核，仅达标人员可参与手术。
3.descriptionEn: Training: Comprehensive and systematic, covering multiple surgical aspects with diverse methods combining theory and practice. Assessment: Strict and standardized, multi-dimensional evaluation; only qualified personnel may participate in surgeries.

name: 动物获取饮食饮水情况
nameEn: Animal Access to Food and Water

1.description: 食槽水槽常空置或污染严重、位置不当，动物难获取饮食饮水，长期饥饿口渴，出现营养不良、脱水甚至健康恶化。
1.descriptionEn: Food and water containers frequently empty, severely contaminated, or improperly positioned; animals unable to access food and water; prolonged hunger and thirst leading to malnutrition, dehydration, and even health deterioration.

2.description: 食槽水槽偶有空置或轻微污染，部分动物因个体或环境因素获取不便，有进食饮水不足情况，但整体健康未受严重影响。
2.descriptionEn: Food and water containers occasionally empty or slightly contaminated; some animals have difficulty accessing due to individual or environmental factors; some insufficient intake, but overall health not seriously affected.

3.description: 日常饲养下，食槽水槽清洁充足、位置合理，动物能轻松获取饮食饮水，且供应量时间依动物需求调整，动物生长健康。
3.descriptionEn: Under daily care, food and water containers clean, sufficient, and properly positioned; animals easily access food and water; supply quantity and timing adjusted to animal needs; animals grow healthily.

name: 需特殊照顾动物评估准确性
nameEn: Accuracy of Special Care Animal Assessment

1.description: 无法准确识别伤病或临产等需特殊照顾的实验动物，对异常表现缺乏判断，且给不出有效处理方案甚至误操作。
1.descriptionEn: Unable to accurately identify injured, sick, or near-parturition laboratory animals requiring special care; lacking judgment of abnormal manifestations; unable to provide effective handling plans or even making incorrect interventions.

2.description: 能大致识别部分需特殊照顾动物但漏判误判多，处理方案不够精准全面，多为通用措施缺乏个性化。
2.descriptionEn: Can roughly identify some animals requiring special care but with frequent missed and incorrect assessments; handling plans not precise or comprehensive enough, mostly generic measures lacking individualization.

3.description: 能精准全面识别所有需特殊照顾的实验动物，迅速制定科学合理、个性化的后续处理方案。
3.descriptionEn: Can precisely and comprehensively identify all laboratory animals requiring special care; rapidly developing scientific, reasonable, and individualized handling plans.

name: 手术室设施设备和管理监督严格性
nameEn: Strictness of Operating Room Facilities and Management

1.description: 设施设备：设施破旧，关键设备缺失或性能差，无法保障手术正常开展。管理监督：管理监督形同虚设，无规章、记录，环境差，安全隐患大。
1.descriptionEn: Facilities and equipment: Outdated facilities; critical equipment missing or with poor performance, unable to support normal surgical procedures. Management supervision: Essentially non-existent management; no regulations, no records; poor environment with significant safety hazards.

2.level: 基本合格，但有改进空间
2.levelEn: Basically Qualified with Room for Improvement
2.description: 设施设备：有基本设备，但部分老化，影响手术效果，需常维修。管理监督：有简单制度，执行不严，监督弱，环境、维护偶有不足。
2.descriptionEn: Facilities and equipment: Basic equipment available but some aging, affecting surgical outcomes, requiring frequent maintenance. Management supervision: Simple system exists but poorly enforced; weak supervision; occasional deficiencies in environment and maintenance.

3.description: 设施设备：设施先进齐全，设备性能优，能满足复杂手术，定期更新维护。管理监督：管理监督严格规范，制度流程完善，记录完备，确保手术安全。
3.descriptionEn: Facilities and equipment: Advanced and complete facilities with excellent equipment performance, meeting complex surgical requirements, regularly updated and maintained. Management supervision: Strict and standardized management; comprehensive procedures and complete records, ensuring surgical safety.

1.level: 监护照料方案科学性极低
1.description: 方案与特殊需求严重脱节，无专业依据且用药随意，还缺乏应对突发状况的有效措施。
1.descriptionEn: Plan severely disconnected from special needs, lacking professional basis with random medication; also lacking effective measures for handling emergencies.

2.level: 监护照料方案科学性一般
2.description: 方案基本涵盖特殊照顾方面但有不合理处，专业知识运用不够深入，应急措施不完善。
2.descriptionEn: Plan basically covers special care aspects but has unreasonable elements; professional knowledge applied insufficiently; emergency measures incomplete.

3.level: 监护照料方案科学性高
3.description: 方案紧密贴合动物特殊需求，专业性强且用药、康复训练科学，应急措施完备。
3.descriptionEn: Plan closely tailored to animal special needs with strong professionalism; scientific medication and rehabilitation training; comprehensive emergency measures.

1.description: 动物状态评估：评估粗略，仅看外观，未查关键生理指标与疾病史，健康隐患难察觉。手术器械准备：器械杂乱，关键器械缺或损且消毒差，严重影响手术进行。环境与物资：环境未检查，温湿度不符；物资不足，耽误手术。
1.descriptionEn: Animal assessment: Superficial evaluation, only observing appearance without checking key physiological indicators and disease history; health risks difficult to detect. Instrument preparation: Disorganized instruments; critical instruments missing, damaged, or poorly sterilized, seriously affecting surgery. Environment and supplies: Environment unchecked with non-compliant temperature and humidity; insufficient supplies delaying surgery.

2.description: 动物状态评估：做了基本评估，部分指标有查，但不够深入全面，可能遗漏问题。手术器械准备：器械基本齐全，有小瑕疵，消毒符合基本标准但流程欠严谨。环境与物资：环境基本达标，未充分调试；物资基本够用，特殊物资考虑欠周。
2.descriptionEn: Animal assessment: Basic evaluation performed, some indicators checked but not thorough or comprehensive enough, potentially missing issues. Instrument preparation: Instruments basically complete with minor flaws; sterilization meets basic standards but procedures not rigorous enough. Environment and supplies: Environment basically adequate but not fully calibrated; basic supplies sufficient but special supplies may be insufficient.

3.description: 动物状态评估：全方位细致评估，涵盖多类信息，确保动物适合手术。手术器械准备：器械完善，性能佳，消毒严格，保障手术安全。环境与物资：环境提前调至最佳，物资充足有序，满足手术需求。
3.descriptionEn: Animal assessment: Comprehensive and thorough evaluation covering multiple information types, ensuring animal suitability for surgery. Instrument preparation: Complete instruments in excellent condition with strict sterilization, ensuring surgical safety. Environment and supplies: Environment pre-adjusted to optimal conditions; supplies abundant and organized, meeting surgical requirements.

3.description: 有关注的计划，会定期关注，出现异常及时处理。
3.descriptionEn: Planned regular attention with prompt handling of abnormalities when detected.

1.description: 生命体征监测：监测频率低、记录随意，基础体征都难及时察觉异常，隐患大。手术操作监督：手术过程几乎无监督，操作规范与否完全不管，手术风险失控。突发状况处理：无应急预案，突发状况处理混乱，加重动物损伤。
1.descriptionEn: Vital sign monitoring: Low monitoring frequency with arbitrary recording; basic vital signs difficult to detect abnormalities in time, posing significant risks. Surgical supervision: Almost no supervision during surgery; compliance with standards completely unmanaged; surgical risks out of control. Emergency handling: No contingency plan; chaotic handling of emergencies, worsening animal injuries.

2.description: 生命体征监测：定时监测有记录，但指标不全，细微异常易漏检。手术操作监督：有一定监督但不够细，潜在风险难察觉。突发状况处理：有流程但人员经验不足，处理效果待提升。
2.descriptionEn: Vital sign monitoring: Periodic monitoring with records but incomplete indicators; subtle abnormalities easily missed. Surgical supervision: Some supervision but not detailed enough; potential risks difficult to detect. Emergency handling: Procedures exist but staff lack experience; handling effectiveness needs improvement.

3.description: 生命体征监测：实时精准监测，记录详细，异常能第一时间预警。手术操作监督：全程严格监督，操作规范全保障，手术安全无忧。突发状况处理：预案完善，人员反应快，突发问题高效解决。
3.descriptionEn: Vital sign monitoring: Real-time precise monitoring with detailed records; abnormalities trigger immediate early warnings. Surgical supervision: Strict supervision throughout; full compliance with standards guaranteed; worry-free surgical safety. Emergency handling: Comprehensive contingency plans; rapid staff response; efficient resolution of emergencies.

1.description: 伤口护理：感染风险高且无观察记录，伤口护理形同虚设。疼痛管理：忽视动物疼痛，无镇痛举措，动物术后饱受痛苦煎熬。康复监测：术后不监测康复，对异常情况视若无睹，影响动物恢复。
1.descriptionEn: Wound care: High infection risk with no observation records; wound care essentially non-existent. Pain management: Animal pain ignored; no analgesic measures; animals suffer post-operatively. Recovery monitoring: No post-operative monitoring; abnormal conditions completely ignored, affecting animal recovery.

2.description: 伤口护理：定期换药但操作欠规范，观察不细记录不全，伤口护理有漏洞。疼痛管理：有镇痛但方案欠科学，难以有效缓解动物术后疼痛。康复监测：偶尔监测康复，指标单一，对潜在问题发现滞后。
2.descriptionEn: Wound care: Regular dressing changes but with substandard procedures; observations not detailed and records incomplete; wound care has gaps. Pain management: Some analgesia but with unscientific protocols; unable to effectively relieve post-operative pain. Recovery monitoring: Occasional monitoring with limited indicators; potential problems detected with delays.

3.description: 伤口护理：规范换药消毒，密切观察记录，保障伤口良好愈合。疼痛管理：科学制定镇痛方案，动态调整，让动物术后无痛感。康复监测：全面监测康复，涵盖多面，及时处理异常助力恢复。
3.descriptionEn: Wound care: Standardized dressing and disinfection with close observation and recording, ensuring good wound healing. Pain management: Scientific analgesic protocols dynamically adjusted, providing pain-free post-operative experience. Recovery monitoring: Comprehensive multi-faceted recovery monitoring; timely handling of abnormalities, supporting recovery.

name: 饲养空间数据记录准确性
nameEn: Accuracy of Housing Space Data Recording

1.description: 记录大量缺失，数据与实际严重不符且格式混乱、时间随意，难以用于评估改进。
1.descriptionEn: Extensive missing records, data severely inconsistent with actual conditions, chaotic formatting and arbitrary timestamps, making it difficult to use for assessment improvement.

2.description: 大部分数据有记录但存在少量缺失与误差，格式基本统一但有不规范，时间不够精确。
2.descriptionEn: Most data recorded but with minor gaps and errors, generally uniform format with some irregularities, timestamps not precise enough.

3.description: 全面精准记录所有饲养空间数据，误差极小且经校对，格式、单位、时间规范便于分析追溯。
3.descriptionEn: Comprehensive and precise recording of all housing space data with minimal errors and cross-checking, standardized format, units, and timestamps for easy analysis and traceability.

name: 体重数据收集和分析定期性
nameEn: Regularity of Body Weight Data Collection and Analysis

1.description: 数据收集：收集间隔超长，或不收集。数据分析：收集后几乎不分析，仅简单记录；采用错误分析方法，结果与真实情况不符。
1.descriptionEn: Data collection: Extremely long collection intervals or no collection at all. Data analysis: Almost no analysis after collection, only simple recording; incorrect analysis methods with results inconsistent with reality.

2.level: 基本合格，但存在明显不足
2.description: 数据收集：有收集频率规划，但偶尔延迟或漏测；时间表大致固定，执行有偏差。数据分析：仅做简单统计，未深入分析与实验因素关系。
2.descriptionEn: Data collection: Has frequency planning but with occasional delays or missed measurements; schedule roughly fixed but with execution deviations. Data analysis: Only simple statistics without in-depth analysis of relationships with experimental factors.

3.description: 数据收集：依实验情况制定科学收集频率；严格按时间表执行，时间点精准；全面测量所有个体，无遗漏。数据分析：选恰当方法深入分析，结合可视化展示；准确解读结果，为实验提供依据和预测。
3.descriptionEn: Data collection: Scientific collection frequency based on experimental conditions; strict adherence to schedule with precise timing; comprehensive measurement of all individuals without omission. Data analysis: Appropriate methods for in-depth analysis with visualization; accurate interpretation providing reliable basis for experiments.

1.description: 活动量每天均超出或低于正常量。
1.descriptionEn: Activity level exceeds or falls below normal levels every day.

2.description: 活动量偶尔超出或低于正常量。
2.descriptionEn: Activity level occasionally exceeds or falls below normal levels.

3.description: 活动量符合正常量要求。
3.descriptionEn: Activity level meets normal requirements.
Normal appearance.

name: 疼痛评估方案制定合理性

1.description: 评估指标：指标单一片面，关联性弱，无法全面反映疼痛。评估方法：简单主观，缺乏科学依据，结果误差大。评估周期：设置混乱，长时间无评估或间隔无规律，难掌握动态。
1.descriptionEn: Assessment indicators: Single and biased indicators with weak correlation, unable to comprehensively reflect pain. Assessment methods: Simple and subjective, lacking scientific basis, with large result errors. Assessment cycle: Chaotic setup, long periods without assessment or irregular intervals, difficult to track dynamics.

2.level: 基本合理，但有改进空间
2.levelEn: Basically Reasonable with Room for Improvement
2.description: 评估指标：有一定相关性，但不够全面，缺少关键考量因素。评估方法：有可行性但科学性欠佳，标准不清晰影响准确性。评估周期：基本覆盖术后，但不够灵活，未考虑个体差异。
2.descriptionEn: Assessment indicators: Some relevance but not comprehensive enough, missing key consideration factors. Assessment methods: Feasible but lacking scientific rigor, unclear standards affecting accuracy. Assessment cycle: Basically covers post-operative period but not flexible enough, not considering individual differences.

3.description: 评估指标：多维度全面，与疼痛高度相关，能精准反映程度。评估方法：科学严谨且经过验证，结果客观准确可重复。评估周期：科学合理，根据个体和手术动态调整，及时掌握变化。
3.descriptionEn: Assessment indicators: Multi-dimensional and comprehensive, highly correlated with pain, capable of precisely reflecting severity. Assessment methods: Scientifically rigorous and validated, with objective, accurate, and reproducible results. Assessment cycle: Scientifically reasonable, dynamically adjusted based on individual and surgical factors, timely tracking of changes.

1.description: 方法选择：方法违背人道，采用如暴力击打等粗暴手段，致动物长时间痛苦。药物使用：药物剂量错或不适配，安乐死过程漫长痛苦，甚至无法达成效果。操作流程：流程混乱无规范，操作失误多，加重动物死亡前痛苦。
1.descriptionEn: Method selection: Inhumane methods such as violent striking, causing prolonged animal suffering. Drug use: Wrong dosage or incompatible drugs; prolonged painful euthanasia process or failure to achieve effect. Procedure: Chaotic and unregulated process with frequent operational errors, worsening pre-death suffering.

2.level: 基本合理，但有改进空间
2.levelEn: Basically Reasonable with Room for Improvement
2.description: 方法选择：方法有依据但未充分考虑个体差异，部分动物可能承受一定痛苦。药物使用：药物基本正确但剂量把控欠精准，或出现剂量不足、过量问题。操作流程：流程基本合规但细节有疏漏，如环境准备不足影响实施效果。
2.descriptionEn: Method selection: Evidence-based methods but not fully considering individual differences; some animals may experience certain pain. Drug use: Basically correct drugs but imprecise dosage control; underdosing or overdosing issues. Procedure: Basically compliant process but with detail oversights; such as insufficient environmental preparation affecting implementation.

3.description: 方法选择：依动物特性精准选人道有效方法，确保动物快速无痛苦死亡。药物使用：严格遵循指南，精确计算剂量，用最适宜药物减少痛苦。操作流程：流程严谨规范，每个环节细致，最大程度减少动物痛苦。
3.descriptionEn: Method selection: Precisely selected humane and effective method based on animal characteristics, ensuring rapid and painless death. Drug use: Strict guideline adherence with precise dosage calculation using optimal drugs to minimize suffering. Procedure: Rigorous and standardized process with meticulous attention to every step, maximally reducing animal suffering.

name: 饲养空间符合标准情况

1.level: 饲养空间严重不符合标准且无调整
1.description: 饲养空间远低于动物种类、品系、年龄和生理阶段标准，不考虑个体差异，且不做任何调整，严重影响动物健康与实验。
1.descriptionEn: Housing space far below standards for animal species, strain, age, and physiological stage, ignoring individual differences with no adjustments, seriously affecting animal health and experiments.

2.level: 饲养空间基本符合但有不足，调整欠佳
2.description: 饲养空间基本达标准下限但有局限，发现不符时调整不及时或不合理，未能完全满足动物需求。
2.descriptionEn: Housing space meets minimum standards but has limitations; adjustments are not timely or reasonable when non-compliance is found, failing to fully meet animal needs.

3.level: 饲养空间完全符合且调整合理
3.description: 饲养空间精准匹配动物各阶段标准，能随动物动态变化及时合理调整，保障动物福利与实验质量。
3.descriptionEn: Housing space precisely matches standards for all animal stages, with timely and reasonable adjustments based on dynamic changes, ensuring animal welfare and experimental quality.

name: 体重异常动物发现检查诊断及时性
nameEn: Timeliness of Abnormal Weight Detection and Diagnosis

1.description: 发现：几乎不主动监测体重，靠动物外在病态才意识到体重异常，发现严重滞后。检查：发现疑似异常也不及时安排检查，检查无计划流程，异常情况难明确。
1.descriptionEn: Detection: Almost no active weight monitoring, relying on obvious illness to notice weight abnormalities, severely delayed detection. Examination: No timely examination even when suspected abnormalities are found, no planned process, making it difficult to identify conditions.

2.levelEn: Basically Qualified with Room for Improvement
2.description: 发现：有监测但频率低，对轻微体重波动关注少，大波动时才重视。检查：疑似异常后安排检查，但有延迟，项目不够全，病因难涵盖。
2.descriptionEn: Detection: Some monitoring but low frequency, little attention to minor weight fluctuations, only concerned with large fluctuations. Examination: Examination arranged after suspected abnormalities but with delays, incomplete items, difficult to cover all causes.

3.description: 发现：科学高频监测体重，敏锐捕捉细微异常，第一时间发现问题。检查：异常后立即按规范全面检查，项目精准涵盖病因，快速明确原因。
3.descriptionEn: Detection: Scientific high-frequency weight monitoring, keen capture of subtle abnormalities, first-time problem detection. Examination: Immediate comprehensive examination following standards after abnormalities, precise items covering all potential causes, rapid identification of root causes.

name: 活动水平异常时相关检查和治疗及时性
nameEn: Timeliness of Examination and Treatment for Abnormal Activity

1.description: 检查及时性：日常几乎不观察动物活动，异常很久才察觉，等引发严重问题才检查，严重滞后。治疗及时性：检查后拖延制定和执行治疗方案，导致病情加重。
1.descriptionEn: Examination timeliness: Almost no observation of animal activity; abnormalities noticed only after long delays when serious problems emerge, severely delayed. Treatment timeliness: Delayed development and execution of treatment plans after examination, leading to worsening conditions.

2.level: 基本合格，但有改进空间
2.levelEn: Basically Qualified with Room for Improvement
2.description: 检查及时性：有观察但频率低，轻微异常难发现，发现明显异常后检查也有延迟。治疗及时性：检查后会安排治疗，但计划不完善、手段不精准，开始时间有拖延，影响效果。
2.descriptionEn: Examination timeliness: Some observation but at low frequency; minor abnormalities hard to detect; delays in examination even after obvious abnormalities found. Treatment timeliness: Treatment arranged after examination but plans incomplete, methods imprecise, start time delayed, affecting outcomes.

3.description: 检查及时性：科学高频监测活动，敏锐捕捉细微变化，发现异常第一时间全面检查。治疗及时性：确诊后立即制定针对性方案，迅速采取措施，紧密跟进调整。
3.descriptionEn: Examination timeliness: Scientific high-frequency monitoring of activity, keen capture of subtle changes, first-time comprehensive examination upon abnormalities. Treatment timeliness: Immediate targeted plan after diagnosis, swift action, close follow-up and adjustment.

1.description: 及时性：发现严重滞后，日常观察疏忽，动物症状发展至严重阶段才察觉，错失干预时机。关键表现：动物有极度消瘦等明显病态体征时才首次发现，增加治疗难度与成本。
1.descriptionEn: Timeliness: Severely delayed detection; negligent daily observation; symptoms noticed only at advanced stages, missing intervention opportunities. Key indicators: Disease signs discovered only when animals show extreme conditions such as severe emaciation, increasing treatment difficulty and cost.

2.level: 基本合格，但有改进空间
2.levelEn: Basically Qualified with Room for Improvement
2.description: 及时性：能发现症状但有延迟，初期未重视，症状加重或持续后才确认。关键表现：动物有食欲不振等早期症状时未深查，过段时间或出现其他症状才重视。
2.descriptionEn: Timeliness: Symptoms detected but with delays; early signs not taken seriously; confirmed only after symptoms worsen or persist. Key indicators: Early symptoms like appetite loss not investigated deeply; taken seriously only later or when additional symptoms appear.

3.description: 及时性：症状出现第一时间就发现并采取措施。关键表现：动物有精神萎靡等早期细微症状时，能迅速察觉并启动检查干预流程。
3.descriptionEn: Timeliness: Symptoms detected and addressed at first appearance. Key indicators: Subtle early symptoms like lethargy quickly noticed, with prompt initiation of examination and intervention procedures.

name: 镇痛方案个性化程度
nameEn: Degree of Personalization of Analgesic Plan

1.description: 药物选择：无视动物个体及手术差异，固定用药，适配性极差。剂量调整：剂量设置僵化，不随动物反应调整，易致镇痛失衡。给药方式：方式单一，未贴合动物状态与手术特点，影响效果。
1.descriptionEn: Drug selection: Ignoring individual animal and surgical differences, using fixed medication with extremely poor adaptability. Dosage adjustment: Rigid dosage settings, not adjusted based on animal response, prone to analgesic imbalance. Administration method: Single approach, not adapted to animal condition and surgical characteristics, affecting analgesic effect.

2.level: 有一定个性化，但可优化
2.description: 药物选择：考虑部分因素选药，但未结合个体健康与基因特点。剂量调整：仅按体重简单调整，未顾及个体代谢差异，不够精准。给药方式：有少量选择，未随术后阶段和需求灵活变更。
2.descriptionEn: Drug selection: Considering some factors in drug selection but not combining individual health and genetic characteristics. Dosage adjustment: Simple adjustment by weight only, not accounting for individual metabolic differences, not precise enough. Administration method: Limited choices, not flexibly varied according to post-operative stages and needs.

3.description: 药物选择：综合多方面因素精准选药，适配性强，贴合个体。剂量调整：动态监测，依个体代谢与效果精准调整，科学合理。给药方式：按术后阶段、状态和需求灵活选择调整，保障效果。
3.descriptionEn: Drug selection: Precise drug selection integrating multiple factors with strong adaptability, tailored to individuals. Dosage adjustment: Dynamic monitoring, precise adjustment based on individual metabolism and effects, scientifically reasonable. Administration method: Flexible selection and adjustment based on post-operative stage, condition, and needs, ensuring optimal analgesic effect.

name: 操作人员操作的规范性

1.description: 人员没有经过培训，操作粗暴，给动物带来痛苦。
1.descriptionEn: Personnel untrained, with rough operations causing animal suffering.

2.description: 人员经过培训，但操作熟练度不高。
2.descriptionEn: Personnel trained but with insufficient operational proficiency.

3.description: 人员经过培训，操作熟练度高。
3.descriptionEn: Personnel trained with high operational proficiency.

name: 环境条件符合标准情况

1.description: 环境条件严重不符合标准情况。
1.descriptionEn: Environmental conditions seriously non-compliant with standards.

2.description: 环境条件基本符合标准情况。
2.descriptionEn: Environmental conditions basically compliant with standards.

3.description: 环境条件完全符合标准情况。
3.descriptionEn: Environmental conditions fully compliant with standards.

1.description: 进食量每天均超出或低于正常量。
1.descriptionEn: Food intake exceeds or falls below normal levels every day.

2.description: 进食量偶尔超出或低于正常量。
2.descriptionEn: Food intake occasionally exceeds or falls below normal levels.

3.description: 进食量符合正常量要求。
3.descriptionEn: Food intake meets normal requirements.

1.description: 单独饲养，没有充分理由，没有环境丰富措施。
1.descriptionEn: Single housing without justification and without environmental enrichment measures.

2.description: 单独饲养，有充分理由，没有环境丰富措施。
2.descriptionEn: Single housing with justification but without environmental enrichment measures.

3.description: 大多数群体饲养，如单笼饲养，有充分理由和环境丰富措施。
3.descriptionEn: Mostly group housing; if single housing, with sufficient justification and environmental enrichment measures.

name: 疾病处理和控制的及时性
nameEn: Timeliness of Disease Treatment and Control

1.description: 及时性：处理控制行动迟缓，发现到措施间隔久，疾病扩散快，后果严重。关键表现：群体感染后数天才行动，众多动物病情恶化或死亡。
1.descriptionEn: Timeliness: Slow treatment and control actions; long interval between detection and measures; rapid disease spread with serious consequences. Key indicators: Days pass before action after group infection, with numerous animals deteriorating or dying.

2.level: 基本合格，但有改进空间
2.levelEn: Basically Qualified with Room for Improvement
2.description: 及时性：能处理控制但响应慢，有拖延，影响动物健康且范围扩大。关键表现：个别动物患病后一两天才采取措施，部分健康动物被感染。
2.descriptionEn: Timeliness: Treatment and control possible but with slow response and delays, affecting animal health and expanding scope. Key indicators: One to two days before measures taken after individual animals fall ill; some healthy animals become infected.

3.description: 及时性：有高效应急机制，发现症状后数小时内制定并实施方案，遏制传播。关键表现：疑似病例出现即隔离、消毒，快速排查病因并治疗。
3.descriptionEn: Timeliness: Efficient emergency mechanism; plan developed and implemented within hours of symptom detection, containing spread. Key indicators: Suspected cases immediately isolated and disinfected, rapid cause investigation and treatment.

name: 环境丰富化方案设计合理性

1.description: 设施种类：设施极度单一，无法满足动物多样行为需求，形同虚设。空间布局：布局混乱无序，忽视动物习性社交，活动空间受限。更新频率：长期不更新，动物易厌倦，难以激发探索兴趣。
1.descriptionEn: Facility variety: Extremely limited facilities unable to meet diverse behavioral needs of animals, essentially non-functional. Spatial layout: Chaotic and disorderly, ignoring animal habits and socialization, limiting activity space. Update frequency: Long-term without updates, animals easily bored, unable to stimulate exploratory behavior.

2.level: 基本合理，但有提升空间
2.levelEn: Basically Reasonable with Room for Improvement
2.description: 设施种类：设施有一定数量但种类欠丰富，难以全面满足动物需求。空间布局：布局有规划但未充分考虑个体差异，部分区域利用率低。更新频率：定期更新但周期长，不能及时按动物反应调整。
2.descriptionEn: Facility variety: Some quantity of facilities but insufficient variety, unable to comprehensively meet animal needs. Spatial layout: Some planning but not fully considering individual differences, low utilization in some areas. Update frequency: Regular updates but with long cycles, unable to promptly adjust based on animal feedback.

3.description: 设施种类：设施丰富多样，涵盖多种类型，充分满足动物各类需求。空间布局：布局科学合理，划分功能区，促进动物自然行为表达。更新频率：定期及时更新，结合反馈调整，持续激发动物活力。
3.descriptionEn: Facility variety: Rich and diverse facilities covering multiple types, fully meeting various animal needs. Spatial layout: Scientific and reasonable layout with functional zones, promoting natural behavioral expression. Update frequency: Regular and timely updates, combined with feedback adjustments, continuously stimulating animal interest.

name: 食欲不振时临床检查及时性
nameEn: Timeliness of Clinical Examination for Appetite Loss

1.description: 观察：日常几乎不关注食欲，出现严重继发症状才察觉食欲不振，察觉严重滞后。检查：发现迹象也不及时安排检查，检查安排随意拖延，无明确计划和节点。
1.descriptionEn: Observation: Almost no daily attention to appetite; severe secondary symptoms appear before appetite loss is noticed, severely delayed. Examination: No timely examination even after signs are found; random and delayed scheduling with no clear plan or milestones.

2.level: 基本合格，但有改进空间
2.levelEn: Basically Qualified with Room for Improvement
2.description: 观察：有常规观察但频率低，易错过早期表现；对轻微食欲下降不敏感。检查：发现后安排检查有延迟，计划不完善，项目可能有遗漏。
2.descriptionEn: Observation: Routine observation at low frequency, easy to miss early signs; insensitive to slight appetite decline. Examination: Examination arranged after discovery but with delays; incomplete plan with potential item omissions.

3.description: 观察：科学高频观察进食，敏锐捕捉食欲细微变化，第一时间发现问题。检查：发现迹象立即按规范全面检查，项目精准涵盖病因，快速明确根源。
3.descriptionEn: Observation: Scientific high-frequency observation of feeding, keen capture of subtle appetite changes, first-time problem detection. Examination: Immediate comprehensive examination following standards after signs detected, precise items covering potential causes, rapid identification of root causes.

1.descriptionEn: Animals show no interaction with each other.

2.descriptionEn: Animals occasionally interact with each other.

3.descriptionEn: Animals interact actively with each other.

name: 环境消毒制度制定合理性

1.description: 消毒频率：频率极低，远无法满足实验动物环境卫生和疾病防控需求，病原体滋生风险高。消毒剂选择：选用不当，或对动物有害、或效果差、或不符合规范，影响动物健康与实验环境。方法明确：描述模糊，无具体操作步骤，执行人员难正确操作，无法保证消毒效果。
1.descriptionEn: Disinfection frequency: Extremely low frequency, far from meeting laboratory animal environmental hygiene and disease prevention needs, high risk of pathogen proliferation. Disinfectant selection: Inappropriate selection, either harmful to animals, ineffective, or non-compliant, affecting animal health and experimental environment.

2.level: 基本合格，但有改进空间
2.levelEn: Basically Qualified with Room for Improvement
2.description: 消毒频率：设定了频率但不够科学，间隔有时过长或过短，未平衡好消毒效果与成本人力。消毒剂选择：基本符合要求，但针对特殊病原体或动物种类，针对性不强，效果有局限。方法明确：有一定描述但不够详细准确，关键环节未明确，执行人员需摸索，消毒质量不均。
2.descriptionEn: Disinfection frequency: Frequency set but not scientific enough, intervals sometimes too long or short, not well balancing disinfection effectiveness with cost and labor. Disinfectant selection: Basically compliant but lacking specificity for special pathogens or animal species, with limited effectiveness.

3.description: 消毒频率：结合多种因素制定科学频率，有效杀菌且合理控制成本人力。消毒剂选择：精心挑选安全高效、对动物无害且符合标准的消毒剂，方案明确，确保效果。方法明确：详细规定消毒方法，涵盖配制比例、使用方法等，执行人员可规范操作，保证效果。
3.descriptionEn: Disinfection frequency: Scientific frequency based on multiple factors, effectively killing bacteria while reasonably controlling costs and labor. Disinfectant selection: Carefully selected safe, effective disinfectants harmless to animals and compliant with standards, with clear protocols ensuring effectiveness.

name: 动物对环境刺激反应关注度
nameEn: Attention to Animal Response to Environmental Stimuli

1.description: 观察频率：观察间隔长，频率极低，难捕捉动物即时反应。记录详细度：记录粗略，仅简单标注有无反应，无细节描述。异常处理：不重视异常反应，不探究原因，也不调整环境刺激。
1.descriptionEn: Observation frequency: Long intervals between observations with extremely low frequency, difficult to capture immediate animal responses. Recording detail: Rough records noting only presence/absence of response without detailed description. Abnormality handling: Abnormal responses not taken seriously, no cause investigation, no environmental stimulus adjustment.

2.level: 关注度一般，有提升空间
2.levelEn: Moderate Attention with Room for Improvement
2.description: 观察频率：有观察但频率低且时间不固定，可能影响结果准确性。记录详细度：记录较简单，仅记录反应类型，缺乏细节和个体差异描述。异常处理：关注异常但处理不及时有效，未充分考虑个体需求。
2.descriptionEn: Observation frequency: Some observation but at low and irregular frequency, potentially affecting result accuracy. Recording detail: Relatively simple records noting only response type, lacking detail and individual difference descriptions. Abnormality handling: Aware of abnormalities but handling not timely or effective, no in-depth cause analysis.

3.description: 观察频率：观察高频且规律，能及时捕捉动物细微反应。记录详细度：记录详细，涵盖反应类型、强度、时长及个体特征影响。异常处理：重视异常，迅速分析原因，依个体情况调整环境刺激。
3.descriptionEn: Observation frequency: High-frequency and regular observation, timely capture of subtle animal responses. Recording detail: Detailed records covering response type, intensity, duration, and individual characteristic effects. Abnormality handling: Abnormalities taken seriously, rapid cause analysis, individual-based environmental stimulus adjustment.

name: 进食行为变化关注度
nameEn: Attention to Changes in Feeding Behavior

1.description: 日常漠视：饲养时不主动关注进食行为，只有动物健康出严重问题，才可能意识到进食有变。异常轻视：察觉进食行为变化也不重视，不探究原因，任由情况恶化。
1.descriptionEn: Daily neglect: No proactive attention to feeding behavior during care; only when serious health problems emerge might feeding changes be noticed. Dismissal of abnormalities: Even when changes are noticed, no investigation of causes, allowing situations to deteriorate.

2.levelEn: Basically Qualified with Room for Improvement
2.description: 偶尔留意：有观察进食行为意识，但频率低，易错过早期变化迹象。简单记录：发现变化会记录，却缺乏深入分析和跟进，未深挖原因。
2.descriptionEn: Occasional attention: Some awareness of observing feeding behavior but at low frequency, easy to miss early signs. Simple recording: Changes are recorded but lack in-depth analysis and follow-up, without investigating underlying causes.

3.description: 高频监测：制定科学计划，高频规律监测进食行为，记录关键指标。深度分析：察觉变化即全面分析，综合多方因素，迅速采取措施。
3.descriptionEn: High-frequency monitoring: Scientific plan with high-frequency regular monitoring of feeding behavior, recording key indicators. In-depth analysis: Immediate comprehensive analysis upon detecting changes, considering multiple factors, swiftly taking measures.

name: 社交行为变化关注度
nameEn: Attention to Changes in Social Behavior

1.description: 日常完全不关注动物社交行为，对明显异常也毫无察觉，他人指出仍不重视、不干预。忽视动物社交互动，对社交问题「零」响应，缺乏基本观察意识。
1.descriptionEn: No daily attention to animal social behavior whatsoever; completely unaware of obvious abnormalities; no action or intervention even when pointed out by others. Zero response to social problems, lacking basic observational awareness.

2.level: 基本合格，但有改进空间
2.levelEn: Basically Qualified with Room for Improvement
2.description: 有观察意识但频率低，轻微社交变化难发现，发现异常后跟进不足，无改善计划。偶尔留意社交情况，对明显异常仅简单记录，后续缺乏深入探究和有效行动。
2.descriptionEn: Some observational awareness but at low frequency; subtle social changes hard to detect; insufficient follow-up after finding abnormalities with no improvement plan. Only simple recording of obvious abnormalities with lack of in-depth investigation.

3.description: 科学高频观察社交行为，敏锐捕捉细微变化，及时记录分析。发现异常立即深入分析原因，迅速采取针对性干预，持续跟踪改善效果。
3.descriptionEn: Scientific high-frequency observation of social behavior, keen capture of subtle changes, timely recording and analysis. Immediate in-depth cause analysis upon abnormalities, swift targeted intervention, continuous tracking of improvement outcomes.

1.description: 监督力度：监督近乎缺失，极少检查消毒工作，消毒效果全无保障。问题处理：对消毒问题与违规操作放任不管，不纠正，安全隐患严重。
1.descriptionEn: Supervision intensity: Almost no supervision, rarely inspecting disinfection work, no guarantee of disinfection effectiveness. Problem handling: Disinfection problems and violations are ignored and uncorrected, posing serious safety hazards.

2.level: 基本合格，但有改进空间
2.levelEn: Basically Qualified with Room for Improvement
2.description: 监督力度：有监督但频次低，难覆盖消毒各环节，存在监督盲区。问题处理：能发现部分问题，处理不及时、不彻底，有复发可能。
2.descriptionEn: Supervision intensity: Some supervision but at low frequency, difficult to cover all disinfection aspects, with supervision blind spots. Problem handling: Can detect some problems but handling is not timely or thorough, with potential for recurrence.

3.description: 监督力度：构建完善监督机制，专人定期或不定期全方位监督，确保按标执行。问题处理：发现问题即严肃处理，追溯根源、落实整改，杜绝问题再犯。
3.descriptionEn: Supervision intensity: Comprehensive supervision mechanism with dedicated personnel for regular and random full inspections, ensuring standard compliance. Problem handling: Immediate serious handling upon discovery, root cause tracing and rectification implementation, preventing recurrence.

1.description: 异常行为出现的频率高，比例高。
1.descriptionEn: High frequency and high proportion of abnormal behavior occurrence.

2.description: 异常行为有出现，但频率和比例不高。
2.descriptionEn: Abnormal behavior occurs but at low frequency and proportion.

3.descriptionEn: No abnormal behavior.

1.description: 饮水量每天均超出或低于正常量。
1.descriptionEn: Water intake exceeds or falls below normal levels every day.

2.description: 饮水量偶尔超出或低于正常量。
2.descriptionEn: Water intake occasionally exceeds or falls below normal levels.

3.description: 饮水量符合正常量要求。
3.descriptionEn: Water intake meets normal requirements.

name: 饮水设备卫生和水质检查定期性
nameEn: Regularity of Water Equipment Hygiene and Quality Checks

1.description: 卫生检查：几乎不主动检查饮水设备卫生，明显污垢、藻类等问题都未察觉，设备长期不卫生。水质检查：从未安排水质检查，动物饮水有健康风险。
1.descriptionEn: Hygiene inspection: Almost no proactive inspection of water equipment hygiene; obvious dirt, algae, and other problems unnoticed; equipment unhygienic for extended periods. Water quality inspection: Never scheduled, posing health risks to animal drinking water.

2.level: 基本合格，但有改进空间
2.levelEn: Basically Qualified with Room for Improvement
2.description: 卫生检查：有检查意识但频率低。水质检查：会安排检查但间隔长，难及时掌握水质动态，异常时难迅速处理。
2.descriptionEn: Hygiene inspection: Some awareness of inspection but at low frequency. Water quality inspection: Inspections scheduled but at long intervals, difficult to keep up with water quality dynamics; hard to handle abnormalities promptly.

3.description: 卫生检查：制定科学计划，高频次全面检查设备卫生，确保设备始终卫生。水质检查：严格按规范定期检查水质，涵盖多项关键指标，保障动物饮水安全。
3.descriptionEn: Hygiene inspection: Scientific plan with high-frequency comprehensive equipment hygiene checks ensuring consistently clean equipment. Water quality inspection: Strict periodic water quality testing per standards, covering multiple key indicators, ensuring safe drinking water for animals.

name: 异常行为记录收集和分析及时性
nameEn: Timeliness of Abnormal Behavior Record Collection and Analysis

1.description: 记录收集及时性：日常不观察，异常行为出现很久才记录甚至无视信息大量缺失。分析及时性：有记录也拖延分析，错过干预好时机，影响实验与动物健康。
1.descriptionEn: Record collection timeliness: No daily observation; abnormal behaviors recorded only after long delays or ignored entirely, with extensive missing information. Analysis timeliness: Even with records, analysis is delayed, missing the best intervention window, affecting experiments and animal health.

2.level: 基本合格，但有改进空间
2.levelEn: Basically Qualified with Room for Improvement
2.description: 记录收集及时性：有观察但频率低，易遗漏轻微异常，记录不够全面。分析及时性：收集后安排分析但过程拖沓，因等待等原因致分析时间延长。
2.descriptionEn: Record collection timeliness: Some observation but at low frequency; easy to miss minor abnormalities; recording not comprehensive enough. Analysis timeliness: Analysis arranged after collection but process slow; delayed due to various reasons.

3.description: 记录收集及时性：科学高频记录，迅速捕捉并准确记录异常行为。分析及时性：记录完立即组织分析，快速明确原因，为后续处理提供支撑。
3.descriptionEn: Record collection timeliness: Scientific high-frequency recording, swift and accurate capture of abnormal behavior. Analysis timeliness: Immediate analysis after recording, rapid cause identification, providing support for subsequent handling.

name: 饮水量异常时检查和治疗及时性
nameEn: Timeliness of Examination and Treatment for Abnormal Water Intake

1.description: 检查及时性：几乎不主动监测饮水量，异常很久才察觉，等动物出严重病症才意识到，检查严重滞后。治疗及时性：检查出异常也不积极治疗，计划制定慢、执行拖，导致病情加重。
1.descriptionEn: Examination timeliness: Almost no proactive monitoring of water intake; abnormalities noticed only after long delays when animals show severe symptoms, severely delayed examination. Treatment timeliness: Even when abnormalities are found, no active treatment; slow plan development and delayed execution, leading to worsening conditions.

2.level: 基本合格，但有改进空间
2.levelEn: Basically Qualified with Room for Improvement
2.description: 检查及时性：有常规观察但频率低，轻微异常难发现，发现明显异常后检查也有延迟。治疗及时性：发现异常会安排治疗，但计划不完善、手段不精准，开始时间有拖延，影响效果。
2.descriptionEn: Examination timeliness: Some routine observation but at low frequency; minor abnormalities hard to detect; delays in examination even after obvious abnormalities found. Treatment timeliness: Treatment arranged when abnormalities found but plans incomplete, methods imprecise, start time delayed, affecting outcomes.

3.description: 检查及时性：科学高频监测饮水量，敏锐捕捉细微变化，第一时间全面检查找原因。治疗及时性：确诊后立即制定针对性方案，迅速采取措施，紧密跟进调整。
3.descriptionEn: Examination timeliness: Scientific high-frequency monitoring of water intake, keen capture of subtle changes, first-time comprehensive examination to find causes. Treatment timeliness: Immediate targeted treatment plan after diagnosis, swift action, close follow-up and adjustment.

name: 行为矫正措施合理性及效果跟踪及时性
nameEn: Rationality of Behavioral Correction and Effect Tracking

1.description: 措施合理性：矫正措施脱离实际原因，无科学依据，不仅无效还可能加重问题。效果跟踪及时性：实施后几乎不跟踪效果，对行为改善毫无察觉，问题持续恶化。
1.descriptionEn: Measure rationality: Corrective measures disconnected from actual causes, lacking scientific basis; not only ineffective but may worsen problems. Effect tracking timeliness: Almost no tracking after implementation; completely unaware of behavioral improvement; problems continue to worsen.

2.level: 基本合格，但有改进空间
2.levelEn: Basically Qualified with Room for Improvement
2.description: 措施合理性：措施有一定针对性但不精准，未充分考量个体差异与环境，效果欠佳。效果跟踪及时性：会跟踪但频率低，数天甚至数周才查看，难及时发现新问题。
2.descriptionEn: Measure rationality: Measures have some relevance but are imprecise, not fully considering individual differences and environment, with suboptimal outcomes. Effect tracking timeliness: Tracking performed but at low frequency, checking only every few days or weeks, difficult to detect new issues promptly.

3.description: 措施合理性：深入分析原因，结合个体与环境制定科学、个性化措施，从根源解决问题。效果跟踪及时性：实施后制定详细计划，高频次观察，发现问题立即调整，确保效果。
3.descriptionEn: Measure rationality: In-depth cause analysis, scientific individualized measures combining individual and environmental factors, addressing root causes. Effect tracking timeliness: Detailed plan after implementation, high-frequency observation, immediate adjustment upon issues, ensuring effectiveness.

1.description: 排泄量每天均超出或低于正常量。
1.descriptionEn: Excretion volume exceeds or falls below normal levels every day.

2.description: 排泄量偶尔超出或低于正常量。
2.descriptionEn: Excretion volume occasionally exceeds or falls below normal levels.

3.description: 排泄量符合正常量要求。
3.descriptionEn: Excretion volume meets normal requirements.

name: 排泄物变化时粪便检查和诊断及时性
nameEn: Timeliness of Fecal Examination and Diagnosis

1.description: 粪便检查及时性：日常几乎不关注排泄物，粪便异常很久才察觉，等引发严重病症才检查，检查严重滞后。诊断及时性：开展检查后也不积极诊断，结果出来拖延分析，无法及时明确病因，延误治疗。
1.descriptionEn: Fecal examination timeliness: Almost no daily attention to excreta; fecal abnormalities noticed only after long delays when severe symptoms appear, severely delayed examination. Diagnosis timeliness: No active diagnosis after examination; delayed result analysis, unable to identify causes promptly.

2.level: 基本合格，但有改进空间
2.levelEn: Basically Qualified with Room for Improvement
2.description: 粪便检查及时性：有常规观察但频率低，轻微异常难发现，发现明显异常后检查也有延迟。诊断及时性：完成检查会安排诊断，但过程不紧凑，因等待资料等原因导致诊断时间延长。
2.descriptionEn: Fecal examination timeliness: Some routine observation but at low frequency; minor abnormalities hard to detect; delays in examination even after obvious abnormalities found. Diagnosis timeliness: Diagnosis arranged after examination but process not compact; delays due to waiting for materials.

3.description: 粪便检查及时性：科学高频监测粪便，敏锐捕捉细微变化，发现异常第一时间安排检查。诊断及时性：结果出来立即组织专业人员诊断，迅速确定病因，为治疗提供依据。
3.descriptionEn: Fecal examination timeliness: Scientific high-frequency fecal monitoring, keen capture of subtle changes, first-time examination arranged upon abnormalities. Diagnosis timeliness: Immediate professional diagnosis after results, rapid cause identification, providing basis for treatment.
